name: Rosehip Glow Serum
shortDesc: Brightening vitamin C & rosehip oil serum for radiant skin.
description: Packed with cold-pressed rosehip oil and stabilised vitamin C, this lightweight serum visibly evens skin tone and boosts radiance. Suitable for all skin types. Free from parabens, sulphates and synthetic fragrance.
ingredients: Rosehip Seed Oil, Ascorbic Acid, Jojoba Oil, Vitamin E, Sea Buckthorn Extract

name: Neem Purifying Clay Mask
shortDesc: Deep-cleansing kaolin & neem mask for congested skin.
description: This earthy clay mask draws out impurities while neem leaf extract keeps bacteria at bay. Ideal for oily and combination skin, leaving pores visibly tightened after just one use.
ingredients: Kaolin Clay, Neem Leaf Extract, Tea Tree Oil, Aloe Vera Gel, Lavender Essential Oil

name: Turmeric Brightening Cream
shortDesc: Golden turmeric & saffron moisturiser for an even complexion.
description: Curcumin-rich turmeric and precious saffron work in tandem to reduce dark spots and uneven tone. This rich yet non-greasy cream absorbs quickly, leaving skin plump and luminous.
ingredients: Turmeric Root Extract, Saffron Extract, Shea Butter, Almond Oil, Hyaluronic Acid

name: Aloe Hydra Gel
shortDesc: Ultra-light aloe vera gel for instant soothing hydration.
description: 99% pure cold-processed aloe vera gel instantly calms redness, sunburn, and dehydrated skin. Lightweight enough to layer under SPF or makeup. Fragrance-free and suitable for sensitive skin.
ingredients: Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Glycerin, Panthenol, Allantoin, Green Tea Extract

name: Hibiscus Toning Mist
shortDesc: Floral hibiscus & rosewater toner to balance and refresh.
description: A fine mist of hibiscus flower water and organic rosewater gently tones while delivering a burst of antioxidants. Use morning and night after cleansing for visibly tighter, more refined pores.
ingredients: Hibiscus Flower Water, Rosa Damascena Flower Water, Niacinamide, Witch Hazel, Glycerin

name: Sandalwood Night Repair Cream
shortDesc: Rich sandalwood and bakuchiol cream for overnight renewal.
description: Wake up to softer, plumper skin. Sandalwood oil combined with plant-based bakuchiol (a retinol alternative) works overnight to smooth fine lines and restore elasticity without irritation.
ingredients: Sandalwood Oil, Bakuchiol, Shea Butter, Squalane, Ashwagandha Root Extract

name: Charcoal Pore Cleanser
shortDesc: Activated charcoal gel cleanser for deep pore purification.
description: Activated bamboo charcoal magnetically draws out dirt and excess sebum without stripping the skin's natural barrier. This gel cleanser rinses clean and leaves skin feeling balanced and refreshed.
ingredients: Activated Bamboo Charcoal, Salicylic Acid, Coconut Glucoside, Cucumber Extract, Aloe Vera

name: Coffee & Coconut Body Scrub
shortDesc: Energising coffee scrub with coconut oil for silky skin.
description: Finely ground arabica coffee exfoliates and boosts circulation while virgin coconut oil deeply nourishes. This scrub helps reduce the appearance of cellulite and leaves skin irresistibly smooth.
ingredients: Arabica Coffee Grounds, Coconut Oil, Brown Sugar, Sweet Almond Oil, Vanilla Extract

name: Kumkumadi Luxury Face Oil
shortDesc: Ayurvedic saffron face oil blend for a luminous complexion.
description: An ancient Ayurvedic formulation with saffron, sandalwood, and over 16 botanical oils. Kumkumadi oil is renowned for fading pigmentation, reducing blemish marks, and imparting a natural glow.
ingredients: Saffron, Sandalwood Oil, Sesame Oil, Lotus Extract, Manjistha Root, Vetiver

name: Green Tea Eye Cream
shortDesc: Antioxidant-rich eye cream to reduce puffiness and dark circles.
description: Green tea polyphenols and caffeine work together to depuff, brighten, and firm the delicate eye area. With continued use, fine lines and crow's feet appear visibly reduced.
ingredients: Green Tea Extract, Caffeine, Peptides, Hyaluronic Acid, Chamomile Extract

name: Moringa Cleansing Balm
shortDesc: Melting balm cleanser with moringa oil for makeup removal.
description: This luxurious balm-to-milk cleanser dissolves makeup, SPF, and daily grime effortlessly. Moringa oil is rich in oleic acid which mimics the skin's own sebum for a perfectly balanced cleanse.
ingredients: Moringa Oleifera Oil, Beeswax, Cetyl Alcohol, Sweet Almond Oil, Rose Wax

name: Lavender Dream Body Butter
shortDesc: Whipped shea and lavender body butter for deep nourishment.
description: A cloud-like whipped body butter loaded with shea, kokum, and mango butters. Lavender essential oil provides a calming bedtime ritual while locking moisture in for up to 24 hours.
ingredients: Shea Butter, Kokum Butter, Mango Butter, Lavender Essential Oil, Vitamin E

name: Papaya Enzyme Exfoliant
shortDesc: Gentle enzyme peel with papaya and pineapple for smooth skin.
description: Papain and bromelain enzymes from papaya and pineapple gently dissolve dead skin cells without physical abrasion. This weekly treatment reveals brighter, smoother skin — no scrubbing required.
ingredients: Papaya Fruit Extract, Pineapple Enzyme, Kaolin Clay, Licorice Root Extract, Niacinamide

name: Vetiver Men's Moisturiser
shortDesc: Lightweight, earthy moisturiser formulated for men's skin.
description: Designed for thicker, oilier skin, this fast-absorbing moisturiser with vetiver and cedarwood soothes post-shave irritation, hydrates deeply, and has a clean, earthy scent.
ingredients: Vetiver Root Extract, Cedarwood Oil, Niacinamide, Glycerin, Aloe Vera

name: Neroli Lip Treatment
shortDesc: Nourishing neroli and beeswax treatment for soft lips.
description: A cult-favourite lip balm elevated with neroli oil and wild honey. Heals dry, cracked lips overnight and leaves a subtle, natural sheen throughout the day.
ingredients: Beeswax, Neroli Essential Oil, Sweet Almond Oil, Wild Honey, Vitamin E
